description: Creating summary figure showing CLC family divergence and evidence weight against GO:0030321 for CLCN7
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create summary figure: CLC family functional divergence and CLCN7 localization evidence
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(16, 8))

# Panel A: CLC family tree showing channel vs antiporter divergence
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 10)
ax1.set_ylim(0, 12)
ax1.set_title('A. CLC Family Functional Divergence', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax1.axis('off')

# Root
ax1.plot([5, 5], [11, 10], 'k-', lw=2)
ax1.text(5, 11.3, 'CLC Ancestor', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Branch: Channels vs Antiporters
ax1.plot([5, 2.5], [10, 9], 'b-', lw=2)
ax1.plot([5, 7.5], [10, 9], 'r-', lw=2)

# Channel branch
ax1.text(2.5, 9.2, 'Cl⁻ Channels', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='blue')
ax1.text(2.5, 8.6, '(Plasma membrane)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='blue')
ax1.plot([2.5, 1.2], [8.3, 7.5], 'b-', lw=1.5)
ax1.plot([2.5, 2.5], [8.3, 7.5], 'b-', lw=1.5)
ax1.plot([2.5, 3.8], [8.3, 7.5], 'b-', lw=1.5)

channel_genes = [
    ('ClC-1', 'Muscle', 1.2),
    ('ClC-2', 'Ubiquitous', 2.5),
    ('ClC-Ka/Kb', 'Kidney\nepithelium', 3.8)
]
for name, tissue, x in channel_genes:
    color = 'green' if 'Ka' in name else 'blue'
    bbox_color = '#90EE90' if 'Ka' in name else '#ADD8E6'
    ax1.text(x, 7.0, name, ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor=bbox_color, edgecolor=color))
    ax1.text(x, 6.2, tissue, ha='center', fontsize=7, style='italic')

# Mark ClC-Ka/Kb as having GO:0030321
ax1.text(3.8, 5.5, '✓ GO:0030321', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='green', fontweight='bold')

# Antiporter branch
ax1.text(7.5, 9.2, 'Cl⁻/H⁺ Antiporters', ha='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='red')
ax1.text(7.5, 8.6, '(Intracellular)', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='red')

ax1.plot([7.5, 5.8], [8.3, 7.5], 'r-', lw=1.5)
ax1.plot([7.5, 7.0], [8.3, 7.5], 'r-', lw=1.5)
ax1.plot([7.5, 8.2], [8.3, 7.5], 'r-', lw=1.5)
ax1.plot([7.5, 9.3], [8.3, 7.5], 'r-', lw=1.5)

antiporter_genes = [
    ('ClC-3', 'Endosomes', 5.8),
    ('ClC-4/5', 'Endosomes', 7.0),
    ('ClC-6', 'Late endo.', 8.2),
    ('ClC-7', 'Lysosomes', 9.3)
]
for name, tissue, x in antiporter_genes:
    color = '#FF4444' if name == 'ClC-7' else '#FF9999'
    ax1.text(x, 7.0, name, ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
             bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFB3B3', edgecolor='red'))
    ax1.text(x, 6.2, tissue, ha='center', fontsize=7, style='italic')

# Mark ClC-7 as NOT having GO:0030321
ax1.text(9.3, 5.5, '✗ GO:0030321', ha='center', fontsize=8, color='red', fontweight='bold')

# Add arrow showing misannotation
ax1.annotate('Over-annotation\n(family-level\npropagation)', 
             xy=(9.3, 5.3), xytext=(6.5, 4.0),
             fontsize=8, ha='center', color='#CC0000',
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#CC0000', lw=1.5))

# Legend
ax1.text(5, 2.5, 'GO:0030321 = transepithelial chloride transport', 
         ha='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.4', facecolor='lightyellow'))
ax1.text(5, 1.5, 'Only applicable to plasma membrane Cl⁻ channels\nin polarized epithelial cells', 
         ha='center', fontsize=8, style='italic')

# Panel B: Evidence weight diagram
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_title('B. Evidence Against GO:0030321 for CLCN7', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')

evidence_categories = [
    'Subcellular localization\n(lysosome membrane)',
    'Sorting motifs\n(dileucine, acidic cluster)',
    'Disease phenotype\n(lysosomal storage, osteopetrosis)',
    'Transport mechanism\n(2Cl⁻/1H⁺ antiporter, not channel)',
    'Annotation provenance\n(family-level misattribution)',
    'Structural evidence\n(cryo-EM in lysosomal context)',
    'CLC family comparison\n(channels ≠ antiporters)'
]

confidence = [0.95, 0.90, 0.95, 0.92, 0.88, 0.93, 0.90]
evidence_types = ['localization', 'computational', 'mutant phenotype', 
                  'direct assay', 'database', 'structural', 'evolutionary']

colors = ['#FF6B6B', '#FFA07A', '#FF6B6B', '#FF4500', '#FFD700', '#FF6347', '#FF8C00']

bars = ax2.barh(range(len(evidence_categories)), confidence, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_yticks(range(len(evidence_categories)))
ax2.set_yticklabels(evidence_categories, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('Confidence that GO:0030321 is over-annotation', fontsize=10)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 1.0)
ax2.axvline(x=0.5, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)

# Add evidence type labels
for i, (conf, etype) in enumerate(zip(confidence, evidence_types)):
    ax2.text(conf + 0.01, i, f'{conf:.0%}', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

ax2.invert_yaxis()

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('/tmp/clcn7_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary figure saved.")
